comment_text.sn22.27:1.2: Said also of the world (AN 3.104), the elements (SN 14.32), and the senses (SN 35.15, 16).

root_text.sn22.27:1.4: Yāvatā rūpassa assādo paññāya me so sudiṭṭho.
root_text.sn22.27:1.7: Yāvatā rūpassa ādīnavo paññāya me so sudiṭṭho.
root_text.sn22.27:1.10: Yāvatā rūpassa nissaraṇaṁ paññāya me taṁ sudiṭṭhaṁ.
root_text.sn22.27:1.16: Yāvatā viññāṇassa assādo paññāya me so sudiṭṭho.
root_text.sn22.27:1.19: Yāvatā viññāṇassa ādīnavo paññāya me so sudiṭṭho.
root_text.sn22.27:1.22: Yāvatā viññāṇassa nissaraṇaṁ paññāya me taṁ sudiṭṭhaṁ.
root_text.sn22.27:1.23: Yāvakīvañcāhaṁ, bhikkhave, imesaṁ pañcannaṁ upādānakkhandhānaṁ assādañca assādato ādīnavañca ādīnavato nissaraṇañca nissaraṇato yathābhūtaṁ nābbhaññāsiṁ …pe…
root_text.sn22.27:1.26: ‘akuppā me vimutti; ayamantimā jāti; natthi dāni punabbhavo’”ti.

translation_text.sn22.27:1.2: “Mendicants, I went in search of form’s gratification,
translation_text.sn22.27:1.4: I’ve seen clearly with wisdom the full extent of form’s gratification.
translation_text.sn22.27:1.5: I went in search of form’s drawback,
translation_text.sn22.27:1.7: I’ve seen clearly with wisdom the full extent of form’s drawback.
translation_text.sn22.27:1.8: I went in search of form’s escape,
translation_text.sn22.27:1.10: I’ve seen clearly with wisdom the full extent of form’s escape.
translation_text.sn22.27:1.11: I went in search of the gratification of feeling …
translation_text.sn22.27:1.16: I’ve seen clearly with wisdom the full extent of consciousness’s gratification.
translation_text.sn22.27:1.17: I went in search of consciousness’s drawback,
translation_text.sn22.27:1.19: I’ve seen clearly with wisdom the full extent of consciousness’s drawback.
translation_text.sn22.27:1.20: I went in search of consciousness’s escape,
translation_text.sn22.27:1.22: I’ve seen clearly with wisdom the full extent of consciousness’s escape.
translation_text.sn22.27:1.23: As long as I didn’t truly understand these five grasping aggregates’ gratification, drawback, and escape for what they are, I didn’t announce my supreme perfect awakening …
translation_text.sn22.27:1.24: But when I did truly understand these five grasping aggregates’ gratification, drawback, and escape for what they are, I announced my supreme perfect awakening …
translation_text.sn22.27:1.25: Knowledge and vision arose in me:
translation_text.sn22.27:1.26: ‘My freedom is unshakable; this is my last rebirth; now there’ll be no more future lives.’”
